name: Barbecued Short Ribs for Smoker
recipeIngredient: 1 3-4 lb beef short ribs, bone-less or thin sliced
1 1/2 cup barbecue sauce of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ribs in a baking dish, bowl, or heavy-duty plastic bag.
2. Combine the other ingredients and pour over the ribs.
3. Toss the ribs so all are evenly coated with the mixture.
4. Refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight.
5. Remove ribs from the sauce and place on the smoker grid.
6. Baste with sauce before cooking and once during cooking.
This sauce can be used on bone-in ribs, just increase cooking time.
7. CHARCOAL: Use 5-7 lbs. charcoal, 3 quarts hot water, and 2 wood sticks. Smoke for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 hours.
8. ELECTRIC: Use 2 1/2 quarts hot water, 2 wood sticks, and smoke for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 hours.
9. GAS: Use 3 quarts hot water, 2 wood sticks, and smoke for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 hours.
